title: Sideways Flex of a Flagpole
body: A $$20.0-m-tall$$ hollow aluminum flagpole is equivalent in strength to a solid cylinder $$4.00$$ cm in diameter. A strong wind bends the pole much as a horizontal $$900.0-N$$ force on the top would do. Model the flex as a shear deformation with shear modulus $$2.5\times{10}^{10}$$ $$\frac{N}{m^2}$$.
